title: Deterministic Tests, Fault Injection, Contract Evidence, and Observability · Go Client Systems · Language Lens: Fake Transport Fixtures
summary: A client library release needs RoundTripper fakes, httptest servers, TLS fixtures, truncation faults, contract tests, and low-cardinality telemetry. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go fake transport fixtures increment in a Go 1.26 net/http fault-injected client verification harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test request construction and response handling with an injected deterministic transport and sanitized fixtures. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Minimize outbound data and authority and redact credentials, personal data, URLs, and bodies from logs and errors. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
